standards_checked.standard_2_no_hardcoded_values: PASS — hardcoded domains/URLs (code.claude.com, api.life-ai.app, api.cluster-fluster.com, dev.life-ai.app) are all pre-existing and outside added diff hunks; security-guard BLOCKED message literals are not parameterizable configuration
standards_checked.standard_3_use_source_venv: PASS — the new IS_SUBAGENT assignment at line 17-20 invokes $PYTHON_BIN, not bare python3; $PYTHON_BIN prefers the Claude venv with a pre-existing fallback; no added hunk introduces a direct python3 call
standards_checked.standard_5_meaningful_naming: PASS — filenames pretool-git-privilege-guard and pretool-bash-safety are descriptive and match no forbidden patterns
standards_checked.standard_6_english_only: PASS (new lines) — Chinese text exists at hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh:897 and hooks/pretool-git-privilege-guard.py:11, both confirmed present in the pre-diff baseline and not added by this diff; any Standard 6 finding on these lines is critical severity but pre-existing/non-blocking under AC-2.6(b) line-level newness rule. Unconditional agents/commands scan: no new Chinese characters found in .claude/agents/*.md or .claude/commands/*.md directories.
standards_checked.standard_7_merge_similar_scripts: PASS — the two files serve distinct purposes (bash safety rules vs git privilege guard); no merge candidate identified
standards_checked.standard_9_parameterized_scripts: PASS — hook scripts use environment-variable-based configuration with defaults (CLAUDE_HOME, CLAUDE_TMPDIR, CLAUDE_PYTHON_BIN, etc.); no non-parameterized values in changed lines
standards_checked.standard_10_dangling_references: PASS — no scripts/ references in either file
standards_checked.standard_11_merge_conflicts: PASS — no merge conflict markers found

summary: Zero violations introduced by this development cycle. Both changed files (hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh and hooks/pretool-git-privilege-guard.py) are clean against all 11 standards in their added diff hunks. Two pre-existing Standard 6 (English-only) findings exist in the full files but are outside the diff's changed-line range and are not attributable to this cycle under AC-2.6(b). These are documented as observations for a future cleanup cycle.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex confirmed zero NEW violations in the added diff lines. All 5 findings were OBSERVATION_ONLY: (1) Standard 2 evidence wording should enumerate all pre-existing domains explicitly; (2) Standard 3 wording overstated venv resolution certainty; (3) Standard 6 scoping rationale should distinguish the 'unconditional scan exception' (agents/commands dirs) from 'changed-files AC-2.6 filter' (hooks); (4) pre-existing stale comment in allowlist helper header; (5) confirmed no NEW Standard 1-11 violation in added lines.

findings.issue: Standard 2 evidence wording incomplete — did not enumerate all pre-existing domains (code.claude.com, api.life-ai.app, api.cluster-fluster.com, dev.life-ai.app)
findings.proposed_fix: Update Standard 2 note to list all domains with explicit 'pre-existing and outside added hunks' statement
findings.rationale: Report updated to name all four domains explicitly

findings.issue: Standard 3 wording overstated that $PYTHON_BIN always resolves to venv
findings.proposed_fix: Clarify that $PYTHON_BIN prefers the Claude venv and has a pre-existing fallback
findings.rationale: Report updated with more precise wording

findings.issue: Standard 6 scoping explanation conflated unconditional-scan exception (agents/commands) with AC-2.6 changed-files filter (hooks)
findings.proposed_fix: Separate the two mechanisms: unconditional scan applies to agents/commands dirs; AC-2.6 filters out pre-existing hook lines
findings.rationale: Report updated to distinguish the two mechanisms

findings.issue: Pre-existing stale comment in check_and_consume_allowlist header says 'atomically deletes the flag' but implementation defers deletion to PostToolUse
findings.proposed_fix: Change header to: 'On match: validates and approval-logs the grant, emits canonical PreToolUse approval JSON, returns 0; grant deletion is deferred to posttool-allowlist-consume.py'
findings.rationale: Pre-existing, not in this diff; logged for future cleanup cycle

findings.issue: Confirmed no provably new Standard 1-11 violation in added lines

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Applied items 1-3 (wording improvements to Standard 2, 3, 6 descriptions in the report). Items 4-5 logged as observations only.
